en: What do you got on the roof? We're tight, but frankly, there's a lot of windows up here.
Commissioner Lowe dedicated his life to law enforcement, and to the protection of his community. I remember when I first took office, and I asked him if he wanted to stay on as Commissioner.
ko: 로엡 위원장은 법 집행에 자신의 삶을 바쳤습니다.
